QA Tester Summary - Issue #5: Detect whitelabel example (https://toronto.maps.gothru.co)

Status: Pending / Blocked by dev confirmation
Env Target: https://toronto.maps.gothru.co
Issue Note: "Access with hostfile pointing to 192.168.1.167 (haproxy)"

Current Review

QA is paused per dev direction. No pass/fail verification is claimed yet.

Blocking Notes

Item Finding Needed Confirmation
Domain Issue title uses toronto.maps.gothru.co Confirm this is the final whitelabel host
Config Current domainSourceConfig contains toronto.gothru.co, not toronto.maps.gothru.co Confirm whether config should add toronto.maps.gothru.co
DNS / hostfile Public DNS did not resolve the Toronto host from QA runner Confirm whether QA must map 192.168.1.167 toronto.maps.gothru.co locally
Source Existing Toronto config points to toronto_source.geom Confirm this is the expected source for Toronto whitelabel
Acceptance Scope is not fully specified Confirm whether homepage render is enough or a specific moderation route/test data is required

Next Step

Resume QA after dev confirms the correct host, required hostfile/haproxy setup, and acceptance criteria/test data.

issues.display_title: Issue #92: Allow marker overlap at certain zooms on mobile devices
issues.main_description_html:
QA Tester Summary - Issue #92: Allow marker overlap at certain zooms on mobile devices

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/panorra-mobile-marker-overlap.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.panorra.com
Objective Routes Under Test:

  • Baseline: /?d=-6.574875110638644,107.79014184884227,21&forceMobile=true&allow-overlap-at=22
  • Threshold: /?d=-6.574875110638644,107.79014184884227,21&forceMobile=true&allow-overlap-at=21
    Correction: Previous allow-overlap=true evidence was not objective for the issue title because it forced overlap globally instead of validating zoom-threshold behavior.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White before_threshold_mobile_baseline zoom 21 + allow-overlap-at=22 -> map and marker thumbnails render so pre-threshold state can be compared Mixed Intermittent
2 Gray threshold_mobile_overlap zoom 21 + allow-overlap-at=21 -> dense markers overlap visually TP when reached Pass in successful run
3 Black user_visible_zoom_rule user can see marker overlap only at the configured mobile zoom TP when reached Pass in successful run
4 Response codes production_api_health production map should run without HTTP 5xx TP Pass
5 Task Sprint #92 acceptance mobile marker overlap works at certain zooms Mixed Fail / unstable verification

Backend Status Code & Review

Flow: maps.panorra.com/?d={lat},{lng},21&forceMobile=true&allow-overlap-at={threshold} -> Panorra map -> marker vector source -> marker symbol layers.

Backend / Runtime Signal Observed Status Frontend Outcome Review
Production route load HTTP 200 OK route opens on maps.panorra.com Verified
Marker tile source GET maps.panorra.com/data/panorra_thumbnail_source.geom/{z}/{x}/{y} -> 200 in successful run marker source can load Verified in successful run
Thumbnail marker icons GET maps.panorra.com/icon/markers/64x64-ghost.png -> 200 in successful run marker symbols can render Verified in successful run
Mobile threshold mode forceMobile=true&allow-overlap-at=21 7 visible marker candidates detected in successful run Verified once
Address-bar production recording Chrome maximized; address bar visible repeated baseline attempts showed map shell without marker/map paint Failed
Objective overlap check closest marker-center distance 9.0px when threshold step was reached markers overlap visually on mobile screen Pass evidence exists, but not stable
HTTP 5xx review no 5xx surfaced during validation no server-side 5xx observed Reviewed

Evidence Notes

  • The corrected run uses allow-overlap-at, not allow-overlap=true, to match the issue title "at certain zooms".
  • The objective threshold run uses forceMobile=true&allow-overlap-at=21 at zoom 21.
  • A successful headed run shows visible Panorra marker thumbnails in a mobile viewport, with 7 detected marker candidates and closest overlap distance 9.0px.
  • Repeated fullscreen address-bar recordings failed at the baseline stage because the map shell appeared but marker/map content did not fully paint.
  • The test also reviewed production response codes and did not observe HTTP 5xx errors.

Bug Notes

  • Previous blank/gray evidence was replaced or contextualized with an on-screen QA HUD so reviewers can see why the run failed.
  • Current objective status is unstable: overlap can be observed in a successful run, but the required production address-bar recording path fails to render the baseline consistently, so this should not be marked as a stable production Pass.

🎥 Test Evidence

fullscreen-issue92-production-addressbar-overlap-visible-rerun-1782716741143.mp4
module-maps-panorra-mobile-de654-zooms-on-mobile-devices-92--chromium.mp4

Demo Link : http://192.168.1.195:3006/

QA Tester Summary - Issue #12: Impelement hook between iframe

Suite: qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/iframe-hook-thumbnail.spec.ts (Playwright, Chromium, headed)
Env: Production https://maps.gothru.co
Recording: Address-bar full desktop capture via ffmpeg, desktop 1920x1080, browser work-area content 1920x944, duration 57.80s
Status: Passed on production

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Result
1 White iframe_map_rendered Parent harness embeds /thumbnail/{slug} -> iframe and map canvas render Pass
2 Gray iframe_ready_hook Thumbnail iframe loads -> parent receives IFRAME_READY with dimensions and slug Pass
3 Black thumbnail_generated_hook Iframe generates map thumbnail -> parent receives MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED and renders preview Pass
4 Response Code no_5xx Run full flow -> no HTTP 5xx responses Pass

Verified Production Result

  • Issue body demo link is local/private: http://192.168.1.195:3006/.
  • Production QA used a Playwright parent harness on https://maps.gothru.co to validate the same iframe postMessage hook behavior.
  • Iframe source: https://maps.gothru.co/thumbnail/g8bfe5ccb0b-2024011031065022.
  • Parent received IFRAME_READY.
  • IFRAME_READY payload included:
    • slug: g8bfe5ccb0b-2024011031065022
    • container size: 1440x944
    • canvas size: 1440x944
  • Parent received MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED.
  • MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED payload included:
    • slug: g8bfe5ccb0b-2024011031065022
    • resolution: 1440x944
    • base64 prefix: data:image/png;base64,
    • base64 length: 88294
  • Parent UI updated to Thumbnail Ready, displayed message count, message log, and generated thumbnail preview.
  • Full test passed with no HTTP 5xx responses.

Response Code Review

Check URL / Endpoint Status / Result Browser outcome Review
Parent origin https://maps.gothru.co Page loaded Parent harness can run on same production origin Pass
Thumbnail iframe https://maps.gothru.co/thumbnail/g8bfe5ccb0b-2024011031065022 Page loaded Iframe renders thumbnail map route Pass
Map style map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/style.json 200 Base map style loaded Pass
Map tiles map-embed-orig.gothru.co/data/openmaptiles/{z}/{x}/{y}.pbf 200 Thumbnail iframe map tiles loaded Pass
Map sprite map-embed-orig.gothru.co/styles/test-style/sprite.json, sprite.png 200 Map sprite assets loaded Pass
Server errors during test Captured API/fetch responses 0 HTTP 5xx responses No backend/server failures observed Pass

Code Review

Area File Review
Generic postMessage helper src/helpers/postMessage.ts sendPostMessage posts payloads to window.parent, stored tour frame, and React Native WebView when available.
Thumbnail iframe sender src/components/main/maps/container/thumbnail/MapContainer.tsx On iframe map load, the component sends IFRAME_READY with dimensions and MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED with PNG base64 payload.
Parent playground receiver src/app/dev/playground/iframe/page.tsx Playground listens for iframe messages and updates ready state, event log, and generated thumbnail preview.
Message type contract src/helpers/types.ts PostMessage type union includes IFRAME_READY, IFRAME_RESIZE, and MAP_THUMBNAIL_GENERATED.
QA coverage qa_testing/e2e/module/maps/iframe-hook-thumbnail.spec.ts Spec validates iframe render, parent receipt of ready hook, parent receipt/rendering of generated thumbnail payload, screenshots per step, recording, and no HTTP 5xx.

Bug Notes

  • No bug found for issue #12 acceptance.
  • The iframe hook works for the thumbnail iframe flow on production.
  • The original demo URL is local/private, so QA evidence uses a production same-origin parent harness to verify the underlying iframe postMessage contract.
